app_tagline: Choose your fighters, analyze their stats, and discover who would dominate the battlefield
app_footer: Data by {#span}PokéAPI{/span} · Not affiliated with Nintendo or Game Freak
battle_start: ¡The exhibition duel begins! {p1} faces {p2} in the arena.
battle_end: 🏆 The battle is over! The absolute winner is {winner}.
battle_full_para: {#strong}{target}{/strong} is fully paralyzed and can't move!
result_reason_elemental: The elemental type advantage of {name} completely dismantled the opponent’s defense.
result_reason_speed: Its speed superiority gave it the initiative every turn, sealing the battle.
result_reason_stats: The accumulated physical consistency and power of its combat stats were overwhelming.
result_analysis_advantage: The battle arena witnessed a high-level fight between {p1} and {p2}. The winner’s strategic elemental and type advantage gave them control of damage at all times.
result_analysis_no_advantage: The battle arena witnessed a high-level fight between {p1} and {p2}. The rhythm was dictated by subtle tactical differences in individual combat stats. In the end, decisiveness crowned {winner} as the supreme gladiator of the contest after the cinematic simulation.
settings_pokemon_language_desc: Choose the language in which Pokémon names will be displayed in the selector and preview.
settings_ui_language_desc: Choose the language for buttons, labels, and battle text.
settings_about_desc: Translated names come from the {link}. Not all languages have translations for all species.
preview_hover_hint: Hover over a Pokémon to preview
error_default_desc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error_not_found_desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
